talent.name: Bewildered
talent.description: 50% of weapon damage dealt to the primary target transfers to another enemy within 30 meters.

items.source: User-confirmed DivGaming correction; verify brand/core/source in source watcher.
items.note: Česká Výroba s.r.o. named kneepads with Bewildered damage-transfer behavior.
items.notes: Bewildered: 50% of weapon damage dealt to the primary target transfers to another enemy within 30 meters when available.
